programme.title: Squawk Box Europe

programme.title: Money Movers
programme.desc: “Money Movers” provides investors with real-time analysis of the stories and the people attracting the attention of the markets each day. Capturing the energy of day's early trading, the program includes the breaking news and numbers driving stocks and sectors, helping investors make critical decisions. “Money Movers” anchors speak with the CEOs, government decision-makers and newsmakers who play a relevant role in how money is moving.

programme.title: E38 - Earth's Unsolved Mysteries
programme.desc: The world is full of stunning natural phenomena that are so strange they defy conventional wisdom. Can science explain Earth's mysteries? Or does human knowledge of the Earth only scratch the surface?

programme.title: E603 - Pawntourage
programme.desc: Things go nuclear when a Japanese Godzilla toy hits the counter. Can Corey come out on top before he's crushed? Chum does battle over a leather jacket from WWII, but will his offer bomb?

programme.title: E3 - Nasi Lemak
programme.desc: Ironically, many components of Malaysia's national dish, Nasi Lemak are NOT even from Malaysia! Let's take a look at how this old rice dish came to be and how its evolution tells the history of the nation.

programme.title: E4 - Nasi Goreng
programme.desc: The Food That Built Asia takes a look at the history behind nasi goreng, a Southeast Asian fried rice dish cooked with pieces of meat and vegetables.

E3 - Sherla's Southern Love
programme.desc: Michael Symon pays tribute to Southern culinary heritage, courtesy of his mother-in-law, Sherla.

programme.title: E8 - Money-Saving Showstoppers
programme.desc: Bobby Flay serves a straight-from-the-pantry menu that features an Italian Egg Bread Bowl,a Spinach Salad with Bagel Croutons and a Gin and Jam shaken cocktail.

programme.title: E9 - Buttermilk Brunch
programme.desc: Golden raisin-fennel soda bread with orange-buttermilk butter;buttermilk waffles topped with buttermilk fried chicken; a refreshing mango-cardamom buttermilk smoothie.

programme.title: E11 - Razzle Dazzle
programme.desc: Carson Kressley and Maneet Chauhan bring the razzle dazzle and a challenge as chefs Rajesh Pathak and Hideki Harada take on Bobby Flay.

programme.title: E2 - Cheese
programme.desc: Katie visits a local cheesemaker to experience the process of transforming milk into many varieties of one of her favorite ingredients.

programme.desc: The teams cook for NASCAR's Mamba Smith and Todd Gilliland at Darlington Raceway in South Carolina. A team makes a shocking decision.

programme.title: Doki and Ducki
programme.desc: Doki stumbles upon a newly hatched duckling. To Doki's surprise, the duckling follows him! It seems like ‘Ducki' has mistakenly imprinted on Doki and thinks he's his mama! To set things right, half the team heads off to search lake Weewannanoh for the mother.

programme.title: Seabirds
programme.desc: During the race, Kit and Mr. Battery will use the wings of various seabirds.

programme.title: Explosive Energy!
programme.desc: Prepare to meet your body's enormous, explosive energy storage system - your liver! Plus, it's time for Dr. Xand to scrub up as he joins Lilia in surgery for an amazing operation on her brain.

programme.title: May the Force Be With You
programme.desc: Eric learns about tiny electrons and how they are connected to creating static electricity. Then he rubs his head with a balloon to create his own static electricity, and uses this to move an object without touching it.

programme.title: Explosive Energy!
programme.desc: Prepare to meet your body's enormous, explosive energy storage system - your liver! Plus, it's time for Dr. Xand to scrub up as he joins Lilia in surgery for an amazing operation on her brain.

programme.title: May the Force Be With You
programme.desc: Eric learns about tiny electrons and how they are connected to creating static electricity. Then he rubs his head with a balloon to create his own static electricity, and uses this to move an object without touching it.

programme.title: Eric, The Map, and the Compass
programme.desc: Eric learns how a compass works and makes one using a needle. He discovers that because of the iron at the centre of the Earth and the way the Earth spins, the magnetic field around our planet acts like a giant magnet.

programme.title: The Wildlife Hospital
programme.desc: Poppy, the cat, needs urgent dental surgery before she finds a new home. Hundreds of chickens get a bath, and at the wildlife hospital, the Junior Vets treat a rabbit with an injured leg and some baby starlings who have lost their mum.

programme.title: Math is Everywhere
programme.desc: This episode explores mathematical patterns in nature, such as the tessellating hexagonal units of a honeycomb, the bilateral symmetry of a leaf, and the radial symmetry of a snowflake and spider web. Math really is everywhere!

programme.title: Dolphin
programme.desc: Today Kristina has to perform an ultrasound on Ulysses, the dolphin's, eye. But can she train Ulysses to keep her eye open long enough to perform the vital test? Meet also Garoe, a one-year-old chimp and Dali, the emperor tamarin, who has an age-old problem.

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

programme.title: Following the Fibre Optic Trail
programme.desc: How do data and information travel from one computer to another? A puzzling question lands you in the wondrous world of fibre optics. Have hands-on fun by creating fibre optic strands, and get to know Charles Kuen Kao, the godfather of broadband transmission.

programme.title: Big Top Doki
programme.desc: Doki is sure giants don't exist until they're invited to come and be giants, at a giants' festival. But how can we be giants? They set off to Douai, France to find out! On arrival, they literally run into two giants.

programme.title: Straw
programme.desc: Reduce waste by giving straws a second more fun life!

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Mystery of the Halloween Haunting
programme.desc: Addison and Tess make a haunted maze for Halloween, but things take a perplexing turn when it seems that there really is a spooky presence on the loose within it – scaring away all their customers!

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: Rhino - Runaway
programme.desc: As the rhino bends to drink from a pool of water, his horn hits a rock that prevents his head from reaching down. This is the beginning of a annoying afternoon that involves getting some water. Welcome to the jungle where funny animals live and play.

programme.title: When Yellow Met Blue
programme.desc: One sunny afternoon, Luna paints her backyard, but her yellow sun turns green! With Jupiter and Clyde, she dives into the painting to discover how yellow became green.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Jorge
programme.desc: As Loro Parque's head vet, Jorge never knows from one day to the next what will come through his clinic. Javier, Loro Parque's Head of Environmental Affairs, is hitting the high seas of Tenerife with a turtle tracker in hand to help with scientific research.

programme.title: Curacao
programme.desc: Nicole joins local teens Skyler and Diego in Curacao for a thrilling adventure: submarine dive, flyboarding, paddleboarding, and golf!

programme.title: Marine Pollution
programme.desc: A monster is rampaging in the ocean, and Kit and Mr. Battery decide to stop it.

programme.title: Oceanic Trench
programme.desc: When the bathyscaph fails during the descent, trapping Kit and Mr. Battery inside, they recall their previous troubles and how they got out of them.

programme.title: The Big Stink
programme.desc: When Darwin and Newts smell something odd wafting through the forest, they discover a geyser and hot pools, and learn how they work.

programme.title: The Day Henry Met....a Helicopter
programme.desc: Henry meets a Helicopter in a hanger at an airshow but Helicopter is a little bored of flying people around the airfield.

programme.title: A Day in the Life of Teresa
programme.desc: Max decides to trap Teresa in her own lies by volunteering her as the subject of a documentary TV series telling 'true emotional stories about remarkable human beings.'

programme.title: Thunder and Lightning
programme.desc: At Catatumbo Bay, a lightning storm has been raging for hundreds of years. The Nektons' investigations reveal who is responsible!

programme.title: Folded Paper, Hopping Frog
programme.desc: Can you turn a two-dimensional sheet of paper into a three-dimensional hopping frog? In this episode we explain the geometry behind paper folding and teach you how to create your own 3D aquarium! Crock, crock!

programme.title: Soapy Sailing
programme.desc: Eric makes a model boat using soap as fuel. The boat moves because the soap breaks the surface tension of the water, causing the water molecules to repel each other and push each other backwards into the boat.

E2 - The Bad Guy Did It
programme.desc: May 13, 2020, Reno, Nevada. Officers from the Reno Police Department are dispatched to the La Quinta Inn after several motel guests report hearing gunshots in the middle of the night.

programme.title: E3 - Ryan Poster
programme.desc: After a woman calls 911 to report shooting her boyfriend in self-defence, investigators uncover a pristine crime scene and disturbing behaviour that cast doubt on her story.

programme.title: E5 - Eva Hamby
programme.desc: Eva Hamby sits down for a polygraph test with a former FBI agent in an effort to clear her name. Hamby was convicted of second-degree murder for the stabbing death of her boyfriend.

programme.desc: Destiny refuses to leave the house and says she 'basically checked out of life'. The extremely hoarded house has come to the attention of the homeowners, and they want the house cleaned up.

programme.desc: Supertato's Tato belt gets locked inside a glass case for an exhibition, but Tomato can't remember the code to get it out again, and Supertato needs it back to defeat Evil Pea.

programme.title: E26 - Mojo Draws The Line

programme.desc: Billy and the Sillies introduce a visit to chicken A&E, the Squirrels build a bug house, Norrie has her chance to shine, and the Penguins give facts about what's hot and what's not.

programme.desc: Bella has fun pretending to be a cat - a Bella-Cat. Together with Lift, she visits Tincy the Spider in the Sing Song Forest, who sings a spider rhyme all about taily-waily animals!

programme.desc: Duggee's not very well, he's lost his voice. The Squirrels want to make him feel better. Duggee tries to tell them that he needs some water but the Squirrels don't quite understand, so they ask all the other animals for advice. Does anyone have the answer?

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: The Real Housewives of Beverly Hills season 15 kicks off on Monday,Housewives Erika Jayne, Dorit Kemsley, Kyle Richards, Bozoma Saint John, and Sutton Stracke return for a season marked by fresh starts, major fallouts and unforgettable adventures. New housewife and fashion mogul Rachel Zoe makes a dazzling return to Bravo after more than a decade. Single and stepping back into the spotlight on her own terms, she's ready to unveil RZ 2.0 to the world. Also joining the group is housewife Amanda Frances, a self-made businesswoman who lives in her friend Kyle Richards' former family home. She's determined to build her future in the land of fame and fortune.

programme.title: The Secrets Of Hotel 88
programme.desc: It tells the story of three estranged brothers who discovered that they are part of the same family. And while they will inherit a hotel, they will also inherit its secrets. However, a rival family claims their rights on the land where the hotel stands, and a fight to take the hotel ensues, and the secrets that are kept starts to get uncovered.

Discover all the stories that make it to the pages, including news from politics, entertainment, environment, business and more. The presenters review these press headlines and offer details about the stories.

programme.title: News[Live]
programme.desc: Watch the latest international top stories, The News every 30 minutes with the emphasis on debate, dialogue, role of cultural differences, analytics of key events all over the world, comments, hot topics of the day, reports.

programme.title: Focus
programme.desc: Keep up with the latest news from all over the globe with Focus on France 24. Focus programme provides exclusive reports from Monday to Friday at 7.50 am Paris time. Find out what's going on in the world of economy, politics, culture, sport, medicine, ecology. Focus has it all covered for you. Short videos contain facts, interviews with real people, numbers, statistics, everything you need to be aware of recent events in the world and of what is actually going on.

programme.desc: Discover how the world's best spuds make it to the dinner plate; why gumballs travel through the twilight zone to become perfectly shaped; just how far hot chocolate has come since the Aztecs invented it; and the secret to recreating finger lickin' barbecue ribs at home.

programme.desc: Discover how cool coils are essential to the tastiest cold smoked salmon; how special cups give a new spin to age-old yogurt; how 1000 kg of delicious ravioli are made daily; and how making three million pounds of crispy fresh salad can actually be easy.

programme.title: E6 - Nurse Sharks
programme.desc: It's time to celebrate, as Steve Backshall's team of ten shark saviours have all passed their dive training and are now fully qualified scuba divers.

programme.title: The Movie Star Says -Sandra Ng
programme.desc: Known as the 'Queen of Comedy', Sandra Ng as an actress has spanned across generations, allowing her to witness the ups and downs of Hong Kong films over decades. Looking back onto the golden age of Hong Kong cinema, Ng confessed that comedies in the old days were much more simple and straight forward. Stepping into the millennium, recession in film industry somehow inspired her to produce own masterpieces of the era. With her youth dedicated to the Hong Kong cinema, how does she feel about lifelong career as an actress, a director and a producer?

programme.title: Doctor Mack
programme.desc: Dr. Mack Lau gives up his career in a famed hospital and opens a clinic in a run-down place. Not only does he heal the residences' wounds, but also their torn-and-broken hearts.

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E3 - Races, Games & Helping Friends!
programme.desc: Join the crew for some fun competitions & a day of helping friends! First, the friends compete in a fun obstacle course to see who can finish the race the fastest & lift the special trophy! Then, just as the crew is ready to demolish an old building, a cute cat hops inside, & the team must rescue the kitten before finishing the job. The helping continues as they save another kitten from a dangerous situation & Dazey must think fast to save Mrs. Skip from a runaway river barge!

programme.title: E2 - Gecko vs Weasel: Ultimate Rivalry
programme.desc: The ultimate rivalry between Gecko & Mr. Weasel heats up! After a big rainstorm, Weasel challenges Gecko to a head-to-head car wash competition. Then, Weasel decides he wants a Mechanical of his own, so he hatches a scheme to try & steal Gecko's secret plans! The rivalry continues as Weasel tries to show off his new sports car but gets stuck, & his automated car wash mistakes Weasel for his car!

programme.title: E1 - Relaxing Sounds for Babies
programme.desc: Little Baby Bum is here to help you fall to sleep; with soothing, relaxing animated lullabies. These gentle and sensory videos are accompanied by lullaby versions of much loved nursery rhymes, helping to take you to the land of nod.

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E1 - An Ultimate Animal Adventure!
programme.desc: Blippi is wondering about animals on an ultimate adventure! Join Blippi & his robot friend FETCH as they travel the world to get their questions answered. How high can a kangaroo jump? Blippi finds out in a hopping race in Australia! How do bats see in the dark? A new bat friend shows him all about echolocation! The adventure continues as he learns why squirrels bury nuts & how ducks float. Blippi & FETCH also help their new friends, like when they work together to rebuild a blue jay's nest!

programme.title: E2 - How Awesome Things Work!
programme.desc: Blippi wants to find out how awesome things work! He & D.BO visit a construction site where they learn all about safety & how a crane works. Then, they meet Frankie the Firetruck to see all of her amazing fire-fighting abilities in action! After that, it's time for some speed as they meet an F1 race car & a giant monster truck to learn what makes them so special. Finally, Blippi shrinks down to see how a guitar makes beautiful music!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E4 - A Magical Sky Adventure!
programme.desc: Go on a magical sky adventure with Twinkle! First, discover the variety of cloud shapes & sizes, from triangles & squares to star-shaped clouds! Then, daydream high in the clouds with Twinkle & Mr. Moon, where her magical stardust makes the moon sneeze & keeps changing colors! The sky-high fun continues as Twinkle soars through the sky on a magical journey to explore all the vibrant colors of the rainbow.

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.title: E3 - Earth Week: Saving The Planet
programme.desc: Let's save the planet with Lellobee City Farm! Ella, Mei & Rishi clean up the pond to make a happy home for the animals. Then, they sing a song about recycling trash! The Earth Week fun continues as they demonstrate litter picking & composting. Plus, learn about bumblebees, make a home for a hedgehog & watch the beautiful nocturnal animals come out at night!

programme.title: E4 - JJ’s Earth Week Recycling Mission
programme.desc: Join JJ for an Earth Week recycling mission! The neighborhood recycling truck arrives, & JJ learns how to sort trash into the right bins. Then, discover the magic of composting to feed the earth! The eco-fun continues as the family rushes to collect recyclables before the truck leaves. Plus, explore the solar system, go on a rainbow scavenger hunt & become a junior scout on a camping trip!

programme.title: E1 - A Super Fun Underwater Sing-Along!
programme.desc: Get ready for a super fun underwater sing-along with The Sharksons! Join the fun as five little reef sharks learn their lesson about jumping on the bed. Then, meet an 'Itsy Bitsy' sea spider who keeps trying to climb an underwater cliff with a little help from her friends! The classic rhymes continue with a curious crab acting out the story of Humpty Dumpty & a cozy pajama party with ten friends in a bed. It's a sing-along full of classic tunes with a fun, fishy twist!

programme.title: E1 - Underwater Problems & Clever Fixes
programme.desc: The Sharksons are using their brains for some clever underwater fixes! When all the contents of Tucker's bag fall out from a hole in his backpack, Stanley & Grub help him fix it so he can get to school. Then, when Grub can't get to sleep because she's afraid of the dark, Stanley has a clever idea to make a 'star' night light from a glove that floated down. From turning veggies into a fun game to sorting recycling, there's always a clever fix!

programme.title: E7 - JJ’s Earth Week Camping Trip
programme.desc: Pack your bags for JJ’s Earth Week camping trip! Experienced scouts TomTom & YoYo show JJ how to do classic outdoor activities. Then, take a nature walk with Bingo to collect fun facts in a scrapbook! The outdoor learning continues as the class harvests vegetables from the garden, counts apples at the farm & discovers the magic of composting to feed the earth!

programme.desc: Rod fishing has a long tradition in the Azores. It is the only method of tuna fishing permitted on the Atlantic islands - and the most sustainable. A counterpoint to industrial fishing and 'floating tuna factories.'

programme.title: Hope For India's Widows - The Holi Festival
programme.desc: India's widows suffer from exclusion and stigmatization. For decades, they have been fighting for more rights, with the help of NGOs. For the first time, widows are allowed to celebrate the festival of colors at the Gopinath Temple - a breakthrough.

programme.title: Crowdsource Murder
programme.desc: Monica starts a crowdsource fund to pay for the hospital bills after her daughter is injured. But as a seemingly attractive and generous man donates more and more money, she begins to question his motives.

programme.title: E80 - Dallas: Arcadia
programme.desc: Derek and Chauncey take on a house that was abandoned by previous flippers! Left with holes in the roof, termite damage and a dilapidated porch this house pushes their skills, and budget, to the limit.

programme.title: E18 - Chrissie And Jamie
programme.desc: Chrissie and Jamie have an active outdoor lifestyle. They want a home where they can just wake up and jump in the water for a swim, and the home must be a place their three adult sons will want to visit.

programme.title: E7 - Meatloaf Wellington With Sorghum Mustard
programme.desc: Chef Deborah cooks a dish inspired by American meatloaf, blending the recipe with an English-style Wellington. She adds a Southern favourite, sorghum mustard, and prepares smothered potatoes.

programme.title: E13
programme.desc: Upon arriving in Pattaya, heavy rain pours down relentlessly. But the Dokbakz don't care. Rain or shine, they go all in. They head to a buggy car experience centre, where they can roam through nature.

programme.desc: Political commentator and Rachael's friend, S.E. Cupp joins Rachael in her upstate kitchen to learn how to prepare Chicken Scarpiello, a classic Italian American chicken dish that is baked and sauteed.

programme.title: E102 - The Crew Builds A Big Bike Shop / The Crew Builds A Super Tub
programme.desc: Rubble and the pups work to build a big bike shop in time for the Bike Festival... unless Speed Meister beats them to it! // When Motor won't take a bath before their family photo, it's up to Rubble and the pups to find a construction solution.

programme.title: E406 - Hospital
programme.desc: Peppa and her playgroup friends go with Madame Gazelle to visit Pedro Pony, who is in hospital with a broken leg.

programme.title: E402 - Whistling
programme.desc: Peppa tries to learn how to whistle after she realizes that seemingly everyone but her can do it.

programme.title: E403 - Doctor Hamster's Tortoise
programme.desc: Doctor Hamster the vet comes to Peppa's playgroup to show the children her pets. But Tiddles has run away. But Ms. Rabbit is going to rescue Tiddles.

programme.title: E118 - The Crew Builds A Library Tea Shop / The Crew Builds A Dance Floor
programme.desc: Construction on the first Builder Cove library is abuzz with bees! This calls for an extra sweet constuction solution. / Grandpa Gravel teaches Charger all his best moves for the big dance contest. But will a runaway disco ball cost them first place?

programme.title: E104 - From One Pit To Another
programme.desc: The Barbababies plant an avocado tree. However, it takes years before the first harvest. Barbabright has an idea to save time that may well lead to...disaster.

programme.title: E414 - Pups Save Tiny Marshall
programme.desc: Marshall dreams he gets shrunk.

programme.title: E123 - The Crew Builds A Fountain Show / The Crew Builds A Carousel
programme.desc: When Sierra Sparkle's big concert stage needs some extra sparkle, Rubble & Crew use a construction complication to make a big splash. // Rubble & Crew decide to go big when Grocer Gabriel wants something special built outside of his grocery store.

programme.title: E107 - Treasure
programme.desc: Tim, Tommy, Tia and Grandma go on the search for treasure.

programme.title: Woodpeckers: The Hole Story
programme.desc: March to the steady drumbeat of a unique avian family. Learn why the world’s 239 woodpecker species, from massive to minute, are nature’s best lumberjacks; explore their flying, climbing, and calling skills; and get a look inside their secret nests.

programme.title: E1 - Desert-Adapted Elephant
programme.desc: Trek across the Namibian desert with the bush elephant and learn how it keeps its cool in a place with little food or shade. Discover how this giant consumes specific plants, digs wells, and hikes endless dunes in a quest to find precious water.

programme.title: E2 - Islands
programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: E6 - Buffalo Showdown
programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.desc: Find out why islands are like mini-Earths where evolution happens before your eyes. Journey from the Galápagos to Antarctica to see how sea lions, finches, crickets, monkeys and other wildlife are finding surprising solutions to climatic problems.

programme.title: E3 - Heat
programme.desc: Go to extremes, from the Sahara to the outback, where animals are teaching us how to survive in our heating world. Shelter in caves with chimps, see camels sip salt water, and listen as zebra finches sing to their eggs to make their chicks smaller.

programme.title: E5 - Deadly Rivals
programme.desc: Enter the world of a wild dog pack whose bountiful hunting grounds are threatened when a clan of spotted hyenas moves in nearby. The vulnerable pups start to go hungry as the scavenging rivals steal their food and eventually raid their den.

programme.title: E6 - Buffalo Showdown
programme.desc: To the lion, the buffalo is not only a satisfying dinner but also dangerous. Track a herd of 300 buffalo along with the Mwamba pride, who must act quickly and carefully if they are to take down their prey.

programme.title: E13 - Eating Habits, Five Years After The Pandemic
programme.desc: Since 2020, several disruptions have changed the habits of consumers. What are they? Also: the flavors of maple, why we love sweet foods so much, culinary traditions around Ramadan.

programme.title: E11 - Around The World In Belgium
programme.desc: Travel around the world... without leaving Belgium! This is the crazy adventure that Nathalie Guirma takes us on. She will stop in Tibet, face her apprehension of the equatorial jungle before taking a break in Papua.

programme.title: E20 - 最high男嘉賓登場
programme.desc: 《非誠勿擾》全新改版，24位女嘉賓分為心動區和觀察區，男嘉賓暫不亮相，在「第二現場」與女嘉賓隔空對話。男女嘉賓通過雙向選擇，決定兩人能否成功牽手。

programme.title: E7
programme.desc: 專為資深單身人士定制的相親交友節目，每集有4位男嘉賓和3位女嘉賓，依序進行一對一交流。未上場嘉賓則分別在男女嘉賓室觀察場上溝通情況，加深對有意對象的瞭解。節目主張為愛回歸，愛情不分年齡，緣來從來不晚。

programme.title: E321
programme.desc: Two-day road trip to the beautiful spots in all the corners of Korea! Instead of fancy studio, this on-the-road reality show takes place in the rural sides. While over 10 million Koreans travel abroad each year, the '2 Days and 1 Night' casts travel around Korea - to the mountains, farms, fishing villages, islands - where you can meet the welcoming smiles of our neighbors and the beautiful nature that cleanse our eyes.

programme.title: E16
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

E12
programme.desc: 先天二年夏秋之交，天子雖已登基，但大長公主勢力更盛，長安局勢陰晴難定。盧凌風和蘇無名，奉命帶著由裴喜君、費雞師、櫻桃和薛環組成的探案小隊，以護送康國所獻金桃的名義重返長安。

programme.title: E17
programme.desc: 《一閃一閃亮星星》講述了林北星意外刪除舊手機中的短信回到過去，重新認識了昔日陌路校友張萬森，從而展開一段奇妙的時空拯救之旅的故事。

programme.title: E12
programme.desc: 程家女名少商，因戰亂自幼被父母留在祖母身邊成為“留守兒童”，嬸孃狼心縱容，意圖將其養成廢人。面對重重陷阱，程少商（趙露思飾）為活命，假荒誕、真苦學，掩蓋鋒芒等待父母歸來。可撥開烏雲見月明時，卻因多年疏離致使親情已難再拾。缺愛的程少商，遇新帝義子凌不疑（吳磊飾）、白鹿山才子袁慎、世家子弟樓垚，三人各有優劣。在選擇適婚者上，程少商既自卑又務實，儘管情感之路頗多坎坷，但她從不後悔自己的每次選擇。在與凌不疑的相處之中，也陰差陽錯捲入了凌不疑的家庭與身世之謎中。種種事件，程少商屢立奇功，也從凌不疑的家庭關係中學會與父母相處之道，以及如何經營自己的愛情。同時程少商與凌不疑也在這些經歷中各自變化成長，慢慢與自己和家庭和解，並堅守內心的正義，攜手化解國家危機，成就一段佳話。

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE delivers the latest from Japan, Asia, and the rest of the world. While covering wide network of correspondents breaking news and developing stories, offering a perspective from this corner of the globe, a team of trusted anchors ties it all together to give you a picture of what's happening now, and what's ahead.

programme.title: E3
programme.desc: 講述失去笑容的朝鮮王世子，擁有冷峻氣質與壓倒性的氣場，背負着喪失摯愛與朝廷鬥爭的傷痛。以及樂觀開朗的女攤販，雖然失去部分過去記憶，仍堅強面對生活。在某日二人意外靈魂互換，進而展開對自身與他人命運的重新審視，並因靈魂互換而展開浪漫奇幻愛情故事。

programme.title: A Beautiful Moment
programme.desc: An ageing bachelor playboy finally meets the girl of his dreams and proposes marriage, only to discover her psychologist stepmom was his first love long ago. The future in-laws initially pretend not to know each other but as the wedding date gets nearer, the rekindling of long-dormant feelings develops into a cross-generational love triangle.
